scripts.build: tsc && cp dist/server.js server.js && cp dist/parsers.js parsers.js && cp dist/store.js store.js && cp dist/backup-restore.js backup-restore.js && cp icon.svg dist/icon.svg 2>/dev/null || cp icon.svg . && mkdir -p dist/vendor && cp vendor/chart.umd.js dist/vendor/chart.umd.js
scripts.dev:local: NBU_DEV=1 NBU_DATA_DIR=./.local-data PORT=4060 tsx watch server.ts
